question: What is the full form of LIC in India?
rawTextBlock: Q1. What is the full form of LIC? (A) Life Insurance Corporation (B) Legal Insurance Council (C) Life Investment Company (D) Loan Insurance Corporation | Ans: A

question: In life insurance, premium is usually paid by the ____.
rawTextBlock: Q2. In life insurance, premium is usually paid by the ____ (A) Nominee (B) Policyholder (C) Surveyor (D) Reinsurer | Ans: A

question: IRDAI is primarily responsible for regulating which sector in India?
rawTextBlock: Q3 IRDAI regulates? (A) Insurance sector (B) Agriculture loans (C) Public distribution (D) Rail transport | Ans A

question: A grace period in insurance is the extra time allowed after premium due date without immediate lapse.
rawTextBlock: Q4 Grace period means extra time after due date before policy lapses. (A) True (B) False (C) Only for health insurance (D) Only for annuities | Ans A

question: Surrender value generally becomes available only after a minimum premium-paying period.
rawTextBlock: Q5 Surrender value available after minimum premium paying period. A.True B.False C.Never D.Only motor | Ans A

question: SURRENDER VALUE generally becomes available only after a minimum premium paying period
rawTextBlock: Q5) SURRENDER VALUE generally becomes available only after minimum premium-paying period (A) true (B) false (C) never (D) only in motor insurance

question: KYC in insurance commonly refers to:
rawTextBlock: Q8 KYC in insurance refers to (A) Know Your Customer (B) Keep Your Commission (C) Key Yield Certificate (D) Known Yearly Claim

question: Which body licenses insurance agents in India?
rawTextBlock: Q9 Which body licenses insurance agents in India? A.IRDAI B.SEBI C.RBI D.NABARD Ans:B

question: Term insurance provides life cover for a specified period.
rawTextBlock: Q10 Term insurance provides life cover for specified period. (A) True (B) False (C) Only pension (D) Only after maturity | Ans:A

question: Claim settlement ratio means the percentage of claims settled by an insurer against total claims received.
rawTextBlock: Q11 Claim settlement ratio = % claims settled out of claims received. A.True B.False C.Only ULIP D.Only group | Ans A
